title: Palembang, South Sumatra — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Palembang, South Sumatra: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Palembang is a city in South Sumatra with a population of 1,708,000. South Sumatra’s capital and one of Indonesia’s oldest cities, known for its Ampera Bridge and pempek cuisine.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
